background.key_experience: Got doxxed and harassed for 48 hours after accidentally liking a controversial tweet during a late-night scrolling session, which made her realize how quickly online actions can spiral into real-world consequences.

cognition.core_value: Safety and avoiding conflict at all costs
cognition.bias: Bandwagon effect - triggered when she sees a trending hashtag or viral post with thousands of likes, causing her to immediately adopt that opinion without critical thought.

current_state.recent_memory: Watching a TikTok drama where two influencers had a public feud that resulted in one losing brand deals, which she obsessively refreshed for updates instead of studying for midterms.
